content: By integrating the 2025 configurable Intrinsic Curiosity Module (ICM) into a multi-agent orchestrated data pipeline, we can turn the pipeline's static sequential workflow into a self-improving system that autonomously discovers and automates unforeseen glue work gaps that human designers did not pre-specify. This allows the multi-agent pipeline to grow its automation coverage beyond the initial 80% target toward full autonomy without manual reconfiguration.
